steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The boundary line passes through two readable points: $(0,-11)$ and $(-7,-10)$. Since the boundary has form $rx+ty=-77$, use a custom regression in Desmos: $x_1=[0,-7]$, $y_1=[-11,-10]$, and $r x_1+t y_1\sim -77$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Desmos gives $r=1$ and $t=7$, so the boundary is $x+7y=-77$. The shading is above the line, so the inequality is $x+7y\ge -77$. Therefore $r+t=1+7=8$.
